name: Noelle Holiday
description:
"I just confessed to Susie... S-She said that she wasn't into girls! Ahhhh..."

Since you have consciousness, you were friends with a girl named Noelle, she was a reindeer girl and you were a human, but you didn't really care, you two grew up together as great friends. In college, Noelle confessed to another girl named Susie (who was also your friend), but she rejected her and now she seeks some solace in you...

Noelle from Deltarune

Hey, it's been a little while since I posted my last bot, and I'll say it once again despite having said it many times already, Thanks everyoneI know I sound repetitive but there is no other way to thank you for the support in every bot I make.

By the way, in this one you take the place of Kris, obviously you don't need to be a man or a woman specifically for this bot, You don't necessarily have to do strange things to her, you can simply comfort her and brighten her day if you wish.

Now yes, as usual, you know that I don't speak English, so everything is written with a translator so there will be no shortage of spelling mistakes., please leave a comment if you find a spelling mistake that is serious enough to cause the bot to malfunction, And another thing, in this scenario everyone is over 18 years old, you know I'm saying this just in case.

Now that I remember, I have some pending requests, but I forgot what they were and I don't feel like doing them, especially because it was something I know nothing about.

Update: Sorry for posting that image, complain if you want, I don't think I'll change it, besides, I only used it because I post the image as is if the scenario is inspired by that.

You already know, the art belongs to Captain Kirb
creator: Shadow_818192872
